title: The Parisian Cafe
description: Transform your dining room into a French bistro. Includes a curated playlist of jazz manouche, a simple recipe for Coq au Vin, and a 'Table Talk' guide for discussing your dreams for the year.

title: Starlit Sanctuary
description: A guide to backyard (or living room) stargazing. Includes a map of the constellations, a gourmet hot chocolate recipe, and deep questions about your spiritual connection.

title: The Art of Us: Gallery Night
description: Purchase two small canvases and paints. Follow our guide to create a 'diptych'—two paintings that become one when placed together. Symbolizes your union.

title: Retro Game Night
description: Lean into nostalgia. We provide a list of classic games, a DIY 'Concession Stand' menu, and a playful challenge to see who knows the other's childhood better.

title: Garden of Eden Picnic
description: A sophisticated indoor or outdoor picnic guide. Features artisanal cheese pairing suggestions and a guided meditation for couples focused on growth and renewal.

title: Cinema Paradiso
description: Curated movie night with a twist. Watch a classic romance and use our 'Director's Commentary' prompts to discuss how the themes relate to your own story.

title: The Culinary Passport
description: Travel to a new culture through flavor. Includes a shopping list for a specific international cuisine and a guide to learning 5 romantic phrases in that language.

title: Symphony of Senses
description: A night dedicated to sensory appreciation. Includes guides for blind taste testing, aromatic candle selection, and the power of intentional touch.

title: The Written Word
description: A cozy 'Read-In' date. We provide a curated list of short stories and poems to read aloud to each other, plus stationary for writing 'Future Self' letters to your spouse.

title: Harvest Moon Celebration
description: Embrace the autumn season with a guide to building a cozy fire (real or digital), roasting artisanal smores, and discussing what you are harvesting in your life right now.

title: Gratitude Gala
description: A formal night in. Dress up, cook a multi-course meal, and spend the evening sharing specifically what you are grateful for in your spouse's character.

title: Candlelight Covenant
description: A deeply spiritual and romantic end-of-year ritual. Includes a guide for a foot-washing ceremony (optional) and a candlelit prayer of thanksgiving for your marriage.
